title: Contender Squadron
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Contender Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that was outfitted with modified, [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]]-equipped [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]]. Assigned to the fighter complement of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Allegiance (Imperial I-class)|''Allegiance'']], the unit fought in the [[Battle of Adumar]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and was part of the force that attacked the [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defenders]] of the [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing]].

Unfortunately, the unit's own TIEs were no match for the Defenders of the [[Imperial Remnant]]'s invasion fleet. It took [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]' [[Red Flight]] to successfully engage and fight off the unit of Defenders.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
